description: John Zenon, a factory worker, was brought to the occupational clinic exhibiting signs of acute heat exhaustion after working outdoors. As the occupational health physician, document this encounter in GNU Health. The record must include a Clinical Evaluation with vitals (Temperature 38.5°C, Heart Rate 110 bpm, Systolic BP 100 mmHg), an occupational heat illness diagnosis (ICD-10 T67.x), a prescription for intravenous hydration therapy, two metabolic laboratory test orders, and a follow-up appointment scheduled in 2 to 7 days for renal function reassessment. Login credentials: Username: admin, Password: gnusolidario.
